command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user sHLCts4RR6iL2PA.1ead08cf1a54 --database bBuQZrfKLoBs6LmtvQ4y6E --execute 
ALTER TABLE companies 
  ADD COLUMN planGraceEndsAt BIGINT NULL AFTER planExpiresAt,
  MODIFY COLUMN planStatus ENUM('active','trialing','expired','grace_period','locked','canceled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'trialing';

ALTER TABLE contractor_profiles
  ADD COLUMN planGraceEndsAt BIGINT NULL AFTER planExpiresAt,
  MODIFY COLUMN planStatus ENUM('active','trialing','expired','grace_period','locked','canceled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'trialing';
